item.title: Download Adobe Illustrator 2026 v30.3.0.182 Multilingual
item.description: Adobe Illustrator is a powerful vector graphics editor developed by Adobe Inc., first released in 1987. It is primarily used by graphic designers, illustrators, and artists to create high-quality illustrations, logos, icons, and digital artwork. Unlike raster graphics editors like Adobe Photoshop, which manipulate images pixel by pixel, Illustrator uses mathematical formulas to create vector graphics. This allows designs to be scaled infinitely without losing quality, making it ideal for...

item.title: Download GrafCet Studio Pro 2.5.0.8
item.description: GRAFCET is the European standard (DIN EN 60848) that allows you to describe functions of control or machines. It is the specification language for sequential functional diagrams. Grafcet-Studio (All Versions) can connect to PLC-Lab (all Versions) via software interface. Virtual scene sensors and actuators are synchronized with Grafcet logic. So you can test your Grafcet chart in the same way as real hardware. GrafCet Studio Pro Features Draw GRAFCET chart in accordance with DIN EN...
